<!--
  Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused on one logical change.
  For data/content changes, read data/CONTRIBUTING.md before opening.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Data correction or addition
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] PR is focused on a single logical change
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or conventions changed

## If this touches `data/` or `src/lib/content/`

- [ ] `npm run check-data` passes (strict freshness + ISM reconciliation + NBER citations)
- [ ] Every new/changed value has a `sourceUrl` to a primary source (or is clearly labelled by `provenance`)
- [ ] I followed [data/CONTRIBUTING.md](../data/CONTRIBUTING.md)

## How I verified this

<!-- Steps you took to confirm the change works — pages exercised, edge cases, screenshots for UI. -->
